examples.title: Using file-scoped namespaces
examples.description: File-scoped namespaces eliminate indentation and reduce nesting, applying the namespace to the entire file with a single declaration.

examples.title: Comparison with traditional namespaces
examples.description: See how file-scoped namespaces simplify code structure compared to traditional block-scoped namespaces.

relatedFeatures.reason: Start with using static when you want an earlier building block for File-Scoped Namespaces.
